contributor_summaries.kasperk81: riscv64 build support; linux tests; vulkanmemoryallocator to 3.2.1; Extend clang-cross to support alpine
contributor_summaries.Kation: Compile Skia with Direct3D on Windows platform
contributor_summaries.spouliot: Metal API for GRBackendRenderTarget to all platforms
contributor_summaries.sungaila: regression that breaks projects using .NET Framework/Mono and packages.config

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried harfbuzz to 8.3.1; skia to Milestone 118; skia to milestone 117.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 carried the import for apps with a base path; Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp; Metal API for GRBackendRenderTarget to all platforms; Move the Blazor workaround into WASM; `<WindowsSdkPackageVersion>` to set the SDK version; .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues; freetype2 to 2.13.3+; libexpat to v2.6.4; libjpeg_turbo to the latest commit: 2.1.5.1+commits.
